goal: Redesign the Story button emblem to be unique from Card Collection and align the title typography with the other main menu buttons.
constraints: Keep button behavior and routing unchanged.
Do not reuse the same emblem motif as Card Collection.
deliverables: A refreshed `public/assets/btn-story.png` with a distinct emblem.
Title typography visually aligned with other main buttons.
No duplicate emblem appearance with Card Collection.
